query: Sure, my user ID is mohamed_hernandez_5188. I don’t have the reservation ID handy, but I do know I want to cancel the flight from ATL to JFK on May 17.

candidate_answers.text: Thank you for providing your user ID. I’ll look up your reservations so I can find the Atlanta to JFK booking from May 17.
